characteristics.$text: This Wargear reduces the amount of Damage suffered from any wound inflicted in a Challenge.
characteristics.name: Summary

characteristics.$text: When a Model with this Special Rule is engaged in a Challenge, the Damage Characteristic of any wound inflicted on that Model is reduced by 1, to a minimum of 1.�

entryLinks.name: Destroyer missile launcher with rad missiles and stasis missiles

selectionEntryGroups.name: For every five Models in this Unit, one Interemptors's plasma burner may be exchanged for one of the following:

characteristics.$text: The Lion gains a bonus to Focus Rolls when he is wounded.
characteristics.name: Summary

characteristics.$text:
While a Model with this Special Rule is engaged in a Challenge, if it has 2 or fever Wounds remaining, its Controlling Player can select the following Gambit:
The Lion's Choler: If this Gambit is selected, the Model for which this Gambit has been selected's Controlling Player add a +2 Modifier to the Focus Roll, and does not suffer a -1 modifier for each point of difference between this Model's Base Wounds Characteristic and its current Wounds Characteristic.
characteristics.name: Description

rules.description:
If a Model with this Special Rule is part of an Army, then the Controlling Player may apply the following Special Rules to all Auxiliary, Apex and Primary Detachments that have the same Faction Trait as the Model with this Special Rule:
- If four or more Troops Battlefield Role Slots in the Primary Detachment of this Army are filled and these Slots contain at least one Tactical Squad Unit, at least one Assault Squad Unit and at least one Breacher Squad Unit, then all Force Organisation Slots with the Troops Battlefield Role in the Primary Detachment are considered Prime Slots.
-When the Controlling Player of a Model with this Special Rule makes a Reserve Roll for a Outrider Squadron Unit which only includes Models with the Dark Angels Trait or a Scimitar Jetbike Squadron Unit which only includes Models with the Dark Angels Trait, that Roll is modified by +1.
rules.name: Sire of the Dark Angels

characteristics.$text: Stasis grenades reduce the Combat Initiative of enemies.
characteristics.name: Summary

characteristics.$text: Once per Battle, the first time a Model with stasis grenades and any Unit it has joined is successfully Charged, the Combat Initiative of all Models in the Charging Unit is modified by -2 for the duration of the current Assault Phase. This modifier does not affect Models in the Charging Unit that are engaged in a Challenge.
characteristics.name: Description

rules.description: While Marduk is part of a Unit that includes only Models with the Dark Angels Trait, all Models in that Unit gain the Hatred(Traitor) Special Rule.
rules.name: Ancient of War

characteristics.$text: A Model with a Cytheron pattern aegis has a 5+ Invulnerable Save and gains the Shield Trait. In addition, the Controlling Player of a Unit that includes any Models with a Cytheron pattern aegis may declare the Shieldwall! Advanced Reaction for that Unit. This is an exception to the normal Rules for the Shieldwall! Advanced Reaction.
characteristics.name: Description

sharedSelectionEntries.name: Destroyer missile launcher with rad missiles and stasis missiles

rules.description:
"This Special Rule provides bonuses when Models with it are Locked in Combat with larger enemies."


Whilst a Model with this Special Rule is part of a Unit that is Locked in Combat with an enemy Unit that includes one or more Models with the Walker Type, Automata Type or Malefic Sub-Type:
• That Model with this Special Rule has its Toughness Characteristic modified by +1.
• When making a Characteristic Check that uses the Leadership, Cool, Willpower or Intelligence Characteristics of that Model with this Special Rule, the Controlling Player may ignore negative modifiers to that Characteristic.
rules.name: Order of the Broken Claws

sharedSelectionEntries.name: Inner Circle Knights Cenobium – Order of the Broken Claws

selectionEntryGroups.name: May have one of the following:
May exchange it's two combi-bolters for:

rules.description: Whilst a Model with this Special Rule has a Current Wounds Characteristic of 4 or less, then in each of the Controlling Player’s Shooting Phases it must have a Shooting Attack made for it targeting the nearest Unit that has a Line of Sight to the Model, regardless of whether that Unit is an enemy or friendly Unit. Such a Shooting Attack must use all Weapons that are within range of at least one Model in the Target Unit.
rules.name: Vengeful Rage

selectionEntries.name: One Model may have one Enigmatus missile launcher selected for it.

rules.description:
"The Controlling Player of any Units with this Special Rule may select an enemy Unit to score extra Victory
Points from."


At the end of the Declare Mission Reserves Step the Controlling Player of any Units with this Special Rule may select one Unit from the Opposing Player’s Army, this Unit is the ‘Marked’ Unit. Once per Battle, the Controlling Player scores additional Victory Points equal to the value of X if a Friendly Unit with the Marked for Death (X) Special Rule scores Victory Points as a result of the Vanguard (X) Special Rule when the enemy Unit that fulfils the conditions of the Vanguard (X) Special Rule is the Marked Unit.
rules.name: Marked for Death (X)

modifiers.value: Up to two Inductii in this Unit may each have one of

selectionEntryGroups.name: One Inductii in this Unit may have a vexilla selected for it for +10 Points.

entryLinks.name: Inner Circle Knights Cenobium – Order of the Broken Claws

sharedRules.description:
"Negative modifiers to Dark Angels' Leadership, Willpower, Cool and Intelligence are limited."
Models with this Special Rule may never have their Leadership Characteristic modified to less than 6. Additionally, any variant of Fear (X) Special Rule may only reduce the Leadership, Willpower, Cool and Intelligence Characteristics of any Model with this Special Rule by a maximum of 1, regardless of the value of X.
sharedRules.name: The Angels of Death

sharedRules.description: While a Model with both the Dark Angels Trait and either the Paragon Type or Command Sub-Type is part of a Unit that includes any Models with this Special Rule, Precision Wound caused as part of a Shooting Attack cannot be allocated to that Model.
sharedRules.name: Companions

characteristics.$text: This Reaction allows the Controlling Player to choose to repeat the Fight Sub-Phase.
characteristics.name: Summary

characteristics.$text: Once per Battle, the Reactive Player may declare the Vengeance of the First Legion Advanced Reaction after the last Initiative Step of a Combat that includes a Unit under that Player's control which only includes Models with the Dark Angels Trait has been resolved, but before the Make Final Pile-in Moves  Step.
characteristics.name: Trigger

characteristics.$text: The Reactive Player must spend 1 point of their Reaction Allowance to declare the Vengeance of the First Legion Advanced Reaction, this cost paid as soon as the declaration is made.`
characteristics.name: Cost

characteristics.$text: The Target Unit is always a Unit in that Combat which only includes Models with the Dark Angels Trait. That Unit is the Reacting Unit.
characteristics.name: Target

characteristics.$text:
1. Instead of Proceeding to the Make Final Pile-in Moves Step of that Combat, the Players must return to Step 1 of that Combat and resolve it a second time, discarding any Combat Resolution Points gained during the first round (but not Combat Resolution Points scored from any Challenges during that Combat).
2. Models in the Reacting Unit gain the Shred (6+) Special Rule on any Weapons they have with the Sword of the Order Trait.
characteristics.name: Process

characteristics.$text: This Gambit may be chosen when using sword Weapons in Challenges.
characteristics.name: Summary

characteristics.$text: If this Gambit is selected, then as long as the Model under this Player's control is declared to be using a chainsword, power sword, force sword, paragon blade or Weapon with the Sword of the Order Trait, in Step 3 of the Challenge Sub-Phase, that Weapon's Attacks Modifier Characteristic is modified by -1 and it gains the Critical Hit (6+) Special Rule, or improves the value of XX of an existing version of the Critical Hit (X) it already possesses by +1.
characteristics.name: Description

rules.description:
"Negative modifiers to Dark Angels' Leadership, Willpower, Cool and Intelligence are limited."


Models with this Special Rule may never have their Leadership Characteristic modified to less than 6. Additionally, any variant of the Fear (X) Special Rule may only reduce the Leadership, Cool, Willpower and Intelligence Characteristics of any Model with this Special Rule by a maximum of 1, regardless of the value of X.
rules.name: The Angel of Death
